calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-12-2013 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:25am
Judge Pro Tem David Fleisig, clerk Jean Kong, D525, nothing reported.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Respondent, Annie Wu appears in pro per; appellant, Robert Christian Gin appears with Counsel, Steven R. Scott. Parties, previously sworn, respectively present their cases in the narrative, and respond to questions from Judge Fleisig.
Appellant's counsel cross-examine Ms. Wu and examine his client, appellant, Mr. Gin.

EXA (1) LIST OF CHROPRICTOR'S BILLS
EXA (2) PAYCHECKS
EXA (3) LIST OF VEHICLE DAMAGE
EXA (4) AAA LIST OF INJURIES
EXR (A) PHOTOS OF THE ACCIDENTS

10:05AM
Newly marked evidence is retained. Matter is submitted.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Oct-09-2013 Judgment Entered
